# Configuration sensitive files
config/database.php
config/mail.php
.env
*.local

# IDE and editor files
.vscode/
.idea/
*.sublime-*
*.swp
*.swo
*~
.DS_Store

# Logs
*.log
error_log
npm-debug.log*
yarn-debug.log*
yarn-error.log*

# Cache and temp
/cache
/tmp
/temp
/var/cache
/var/tmp

# Upload directories (important for your music platform)
/uploads/
/uploads/musique/
/uploads/covers/
/uploads/temp/

# Dependencies (if you use Composer later)
/vendor/
/composer.lock
/composer.phar

# PHPUnit
/phpunit.xml
.phpunit.result.cache

# OS generated files
Thumbs.db
ehthumbs.db
Desktop.ini
$RECYCLE.BIN/

# Development environment
/.env
/.env.local
/.env.dev
/.env.prod
